name: The Best Blueberry Muffins
recipeIngredient: 2 1/2 cups Blueberries, mashed with a fork (half cup)
1 tablespoon Sugar mixed with 1/4 teaspoon ground nutmeg
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375°F.
2. Grease 12 regular muffin cups, making sure to coat the area between each cup or use foil-lined baking cups.
3. In a medium bowl, beat butter until creamy.
4. Add sugar and beat until pale and fluffy.
5. Beat in eggs one at a time.
6. Stir in vanilla extract, baking powder, and salt.
7. Mix mashed berries into the batter.
8. Fold in half of the flour with a spatula, then half of the milk.
9. Add remaining flour and milk.
10. Fold in the remaining blueberries.
11. Spoon batter into muffin cups and sprinkle with nutmeg sugar.
12. Bake for 25 to 30 minutes, or until golden brown. Allow muffins to cool at least 30 minutes in the pan before removing them.
